---
title: "Code Chunks"
author: "Paloma B. Lopes"
affilitation: "JHU"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    theme: 
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
    toc: true
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: true 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
self-contained: true
lang: en   
bibliography: bibby.bib
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---
#Code Chunks
